inputs.description: Inspected AUDIT, AUTHORITY, CANONICALITY, EVIDENCE, MUTATION, PRIVACY, and ROUTING policy files.
Inspected the ODS-0 case catalog and UI runner.
Inspected the bridge types, host listener, and registry used by the ODS cases.

outputs.change: Completes all nine non-human P0 UI runners, adds one-click Run P0 suite, bounded burst evidence, operator-note redaction, and bounded diagnosis-pack metadata.
Promotes BR-003, BR-004, and BR-005 from ODS-0 SKIP to implemented P0 cases while retaining the exact shared case IDs.
Rejects trusted protocol-shaped malformed envelopes with a bounded MALFORMED_ENVELOPE receipt and no mutation.
Strengthens runtime envelope-shape validation before bridge handling.
Adds the inert malformed-envelope diagnostic fixture used by the real iframe-to-host runner.
Replaces the ODS-0 smoke with the headless P0 twin for DEV and preview, driving the UI catalog and one-click runner and checking exports, redaction, bounded logs, and browser errors.
Adds npm run ods:p0 and retains ods:smoke as a compatibility alias.
Regenerates the production single-file pack with ODS-1.
Regenerates the compatibility single-file pack with ODS-1.

claims: All nine non-human P0 case IDs from DIAGNOSTIC_SUITE §4.2 execute from the one-click UI runner and pass in DEV and production preview.
ODS-BR-003 rejects a trusted malformed protocol envelope with MALFORMED_ENVELOPE and no browser crash.
ODS-BR-004 rejects ods.unknown-channel with an explicit UNKNOWN_CHANNEL receipt naming the channel.
ODS-BR-005 sends 20 pings, observes all 20 accepted, yields to the browser event loop, and truncates the bridge log to its configured 12-entry bound.
The exported diagnosis pack remains noted.ods-pack/v1 with status_authority NONE; the automated fixture verifies sk-, Bearer-, and nsec-shaped redaction.
The diagnosis pack includes bounded storage metadata only and does not dump IndexedDB records or private notes.
Phase 1 bridge smoke, registry verification, typecheck, build, Lab doctor, 190 Lab unit tests, and Lab verify remain green under the documented dependency-tree condition.
non_claims: Passing P0 is diagnostic runtime evidence, not full ODS load-bearing process proof unless the separately required real-bug diagnosis or seat-VERIFY adoption criterion is accepted as satisfied.
This work and receipt are not a security audit or production-readiness claim.
Phase 2 Agent, prompt product, broker, simulator frame, creature, and Nostr product work were not started.
Human-only ODS cases remain human and were not automated or claimed as passed.
No real-world value, funds, token, redeem, or economic authorization surface was added.
The receipt is committed after the immutable verified product commit named by verified_at_commit; the receipt-only commit does not alter verified product files.

checks.result: PASS; added and audited 166 packages. npm audit reported 5 existing findings (1 low, 3 moderate, 1 high).
PASS; Vite transformed 297 modules and pack.js emitted both single-file HTML artifacts.
PASS in DEV; trusted/untrusted bridge checks and browser error checks remained green.
PASS in DEV; all nine P0 cases, one-click runner, bounded burst, pack schema/authority, redaction fixtures, storage boundary, and browser error checks passed.
PASS in production preview with the same P0 and export assertions; production Diagnostics sidebar entry remained hidden.
PASS after temporarily moving ignored node_modules outside the worktree; dirty-worktree warning only.
PASS after temporarily moving ignored node_modules outside the worktree.

limitations: Lab doctor recursively inspects ignored node_modules and rejects npm-created .bin symlinks and third-party JSONC; the Lab standard checks pass when that ignored dependency directory is temporarily outside the worktree, and it was restored afterward.
The in-product pack console arrays remain schema-shaped and empty; Playwright separately captures and asserts console and uncaught page errors in both runtime modes.
lab_git_head and noted_build_commit remain null because the host has no build-time commit injection; the fields are present without invented values.
The existing local Playwright Chromium cache is used when the package-expected browser revision is absent.
npm audit reported 5 dependency findings (1 low, 3 moderate, 1 high); dependency remediation is outside ODS-1 scope.
next: NEXT: SEAT-GROK-DRIVE for ODS-1 acceptance. Do not begin Phase 2.
